## Tech Stack

- Use Tailwind CSS v4 and DaisyUI for all styling needs.
- Use Astro with the astro-pods architecture.
- Use the Content Island Client API to fetch and render content.

## Code Guidelines

- Use semantic HTML5 elements.
- Follow accessibility best practices.
- Design mobile-first, ensuring a responsive experience across all devices.

## Design

- Use a professional color palette with good contrast.
- Avoid generic or AI-looking designs; aim for a visually appealing and coherent UI.

## Architecture

- Follow the astro-pods structure to organize the codebase.
- Separate layers clearly: UI, domain logic, and data access.
- Strictly follow the Content Island Client API security rules and allowed API surface.
